title: Fancy Dirt!
description: A better, updated look for Dirt and its related blocks!
body:
![Title of the project: "Fancy DIrt!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02c8cc4ea6c4d622400cee69329653216d14c685.png)
---
[![ko-fi](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg&n=-1)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T81FJU3R)

**Fancy Grass!** is a small Resource Pack that replaces the texture of **Dirt and every Dirt-related block**, updating their looks to appear fresher, and more in line with the current **Vanilla style**. 

Because of this, most blocks in this Resource Pack are much **more colorful** and have **less overall contrast**!

![Isometric render of the updated blocks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40889fb0cbe7bcc312c6535de945ebac0d32d1c6.png)
Specifically, here is a list of all the blocks that have been updated:
- **Dirt, Coarse Dirt** and **Rooted Dirt** blocks.
- **Grass Block, Short Grass** and **Tall Grass** blocks.
- **Mycelium** and **Podzol** blocks.
- **Dirt Paths**.
---
The Resource Pack is fully compatible with **MC 1.9-1.21.8**, with **support planned** for any future versions!

---
### Support 
If you like my Data Packs, Resource Packs or textures, consider **donating**, it would really mean a lot to me. If you are interested in **commissioning** any content, **contact me** on any available platform, I'll try to reach out to you as fast as I can.

**Suggestions** for future Minecraft content are also well received. Thank you for taking a look at my content. :)
